title: dioscorea villosa var. glabrifolia
intro: Dioscorea villosa var. glabrifolia, also known as Chinese yam or bare-rooted yam, is a variety of the yam plant native to China and North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Dioscorea villosa var. glabrifolia include supporting immune function, reducing stress and anxiety, and improving cardiovascular health. It can be prepared as a dietary supplement, tea, or tincture, and is often consumed as a dried powder or capsule in herbal medicine.
